title: Eplidium humifusum

I couldn't find any information on the plant 'Eplidium humifusum'. However, I suspect the plant you are referring to is 'Epilobium' or 'Fireweed' (Epilobium spp.), which is a flowering plant native to the Northern Hemisphere.

Here is a paragraph about Epilobium:

Epilobium, commonly known as Fireweed, is a flowering plant that grows in wet environments, such as meadows and along streams. The health benefits of Epilobium include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the body. The bioactive constituents of Epilobium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Epilobium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other inflammatory conditions.
